actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour fileID 137028029; script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building101 registers eventID=4 (PointerClick) with a persistent call to MonoBehaviour fileID 137028027 (script guid b78288e601dcaac41ae0297908e55692, class Bank).
